untranslatable_reason: This is an EXIT/STOP-LOSS rule, not a POSITION SIZING rule. It describes when and how to exit trades (trend reversal confirmation, ATR-based stops), not how to determine position size. The parameters (reversal_confirmation_bars, stop_loss_atr_multiple, trend_reversal_threshold_percent) define exit conditions and stop placement, which belong in the standard DSL for entry/exit signals, not position sizing.
